use_cases: Creating infinite horizontal or vertical draggable scroll areas for gallery content
Building interactive image grids with masonry or polaroid layouts
Implementing touch-friendly drag navigation for mobile apps
Adding wheel scroll support to drag-based interfaces
Creating photo carousels or asset browsers with smooth momentum-based scrolling
ai_summary: An infinite drag scroll container component using Framer Motion that enables smooth, momentum-based drag interactions with wheel scroll support. Features wrapping logic for seamless infinite scrolling and supports multiple layout variants (default, masonry, polaroid). Optimized for gallery-style content and image browsers where users need fluid navigation through large collections.
